About Us

Psalmy Tech is a modern technology brand focused on DevOps, cloud engineering, automation, and digital solutions. We build scalable systems and empower businesses with reliable tech infrastructure.

Our Services

  • DevOps Automation
  • Cloud Engineering (AWS, Azure)
  • CI/CD Pipeline Development
  • Containerization & Kubernetes
  • Web & Application Deployment
